rulings.Case Title: GENARO PAED VS. WASHINGTON MUTUAL BANK A BUSINESS ENTITY FORM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings; Request For Judicial Notice
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, June 29, 2010, line 5, DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A., Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings. Is granted, without leave to amend. No opposition filed. Judgment in favor of defendant to be entered forthwith. See CCP section 438(h)(3). =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: AUGUSTINE FALLAY VS. CRYSTAL LEI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mo For Atty'S Fees And Cost From Pltf
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, June 29, 2010, line 6, DEFENDANTS CRYSTAL LEI, and, TONY FU Motion for Attorney's Fees and Costs from Plaintiff. Motion is granted. Defendant awarded $17,161 (reasonable attorney fees of $13,446 plus $3,715 costs.) Counsel filed an anti-SLAPP motion for co'defendant Lei, prepared the reply, and argued the matter. The demurrer and motion to strike were intertwined such that it is impracticable to separate the attorney's time. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: MARGARET BARROWS VS. WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, June 29, 2010, line 7, DEFENDANT ADDUS HEALTHCARE INC. MOTION TO STRIKE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Is granted as to injunctive relief, denied as to all other requests. Ten days leave to answer. =(302/CWW)
